label: Execution Steps
description: Step list with reorder, duplicate, field editing, dependency links, and visual execution flow diagram.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 availableOn=[bundles]. 0.4 No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 No mock imports in widget file. 0.6 N/A — context is pure local state (no async fetch); no isLoading field. 0.7 Empty state present (steps.length===0 guard with Add leg and Use template buttons). 0.8 N/A — context has no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary handles render errors. 0.9 No dead code. Fixed: wired readOnly from context to disable mutation buttons (Add leg, Use template, Clear all) in batch mode.

l1.notes: 1.1 All step data from useBundlesData() hook (steps, addStep, removeStep, moveStep, duplicateStep, updateStep, operationTypes, venues, instruments, clearSteps, readOnly). 1.2 Context calls useGlobalScope() and derives hasDefiDesk from org scope. 1.3 Org filter: hasDefiDesk controls which operation types are available via scoped templates. 1.4-1.5 N/A — bundle steps are user-authored; client/strategy cascade doesn't apply to step construction. 1.6 Empty org scope → hasDefiDesk=true → no restriction. 1.7 Reference data (ALL_OPERATION_TYPES, BUNDLE_VENUES, BUNDLE_INSTRUMENTS) in lib/config/services/bundle.config — correct location.

findings: readOnly flag wired to disable Add leg, Use template, Clear all mutation buttons in batch mode
